limitations: No quantified dollar amounts, GPU counts, or percentage-of-capex figures tied to AI investment were found in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 rather than 4 or 5.

AI narrative concreteness scored 4 based on named deployed use cases (AI-driven fulfillment platform, device care center automation, HR virtual assistant) but no quantified business results (e.g., cost savings, throughput metrics) were disclosed in the excerpts.

Risk disclosure depth scored 4 based on named company-specific risk mechanisms (vendor dependency for AI infrastructure, competitive disruption, regulatory compliance costs, AI failure risk) and named governance body (IT Committee); no quantified risk exposure or formal risk-quantification program was cited.
